arts.ttl: Milan Enter the Race for Young Monza Midfielder Wanted at Lazio
arts.sum: Lazio are reportedly facing competition from Milan who have now entered the fray for Monza youngster Warren Bondo. The Background The 21-year-old is a French midfielder of Congolese origins. He started his career at AS Nancy before being poached by Monza in the summer of 2022 on a free transfer.
